zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Preston of Craigmillar於1417年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Sir John I Preston26歲，母親Christian Cockburn22歲。他於1442年與Joan Marchante結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1453年7月11日在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼拉迪享年36歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Preston of Craigmillar于1417年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲Sir John I Preston26岁，母亲Christian Cockburn22岁。他于1442年与Joan Marchante结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1453年7月11日在英国苏格兰奧可尼拉迪享年36岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Preston of Craigmillar was born in 1417, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, Sir John I Preston, was 26 and his mother, Christian Cockburn, was 22. He married Joan Marchante in 1442. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 11 July 1453, in Lady, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Preston of Craigmillar est né en 1417, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Sir John I Preston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Christian Cockburn, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Marchante en 1442. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1453, à Lady, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Preston of Craigmillar 1417 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John I Preston 26 und seine Mutter Christian Cockburn 22. Er hat 1442 Joan Marchante geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 11. Juli 1453 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lady, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Preston of Craigmillar è nato il nel 1417 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John I Preston, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Christian Cockburn, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Marchante nel 1442. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 11 luglio 1453, nel Lady, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Preston of Craigmillarが1417年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Sir John I Prestonは26歳，母Christian Cockburnは22歳であった。1442年にJoan Marchanteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1453年7月11日にイギリススコットランドオルクニーラディで36歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Preston of Craigmillar(이)가 1417년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Preston(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Cockburn(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1442년 Joan Marchante(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1453년 7월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 레이디에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Preston of Craigmillar nasceu em 1417, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John I Preston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Christian Cockburn, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Marchante em 1442. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1453, em Lady, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Preston of Craigmillar родился в 1417 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John I Preston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Cockburn, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Marchante в 1442 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 11 июля 1453 г. в местности леди, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Preston of Craigmillar nació en 1417, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Sir John I Preston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Christian Cockburn, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Marchante en 1442. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 11 de julio de 1453, en Lady, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
